name: PAY_REPORT_RECORDS_VL
query: SELECT rec.REPORT_RECORD_ID REPORT_RECORD_ID, rec.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, rec.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, rec.REPORT_BLOCK_ID REPORT_BLOCK_ID, ATTRIBUTE6, rec.ATTRIBUTE7 ATTRIBUTE7, rec.ATTRIBUTE8 ATTRIBUTE8, rec.ATTRIBUTE9 ATTRIBUTE9, rec.ATTRIBUTE10 ATTRIBUTE10, rec.ATTRIBUTE11 ATTRIBUTE11, rec.ATTRIBUTE12 ATTRIBUTE12, rec.ATTRIBUTE13 ATTRIBUTE13, rec.ATTRIBUTE14 ATTRIBUTE14, rec.ATTRIBUTE15 ATTRIBUTE15, rec.ATTRIBUTE16 ATTRIBUTE16, rec.ATTRIBUTE17 ATTRIBUTE17, rec.ATTRIBUTE18 ATTRIBUTE18, rec.ATTRIBUTE19 ATTRIBUTE19, rec.ATTRIBUTE20 ATTRIBUTE20, rec.ATTRIBUTE21 ATTRIBUTE21, rec.ATTRIBUTE22 ATTRIBUTE22, rec.ATTRIBUTE23 ATTRIBUTE23, rec.ATTRIBUTE24 ATTRIBUTE24, rec.ATTRIBUTE25 ATTRIBUTE25, rec.ATTRIBUTE26 ATTRIBUTE26, rec.ATTRIBUTE27 ATTRIBUTE27, rec.ATTRIBUTE28 ATTRIBUTE28, rec.ATTRIBUTE29 ATTRIBUTE29, rec.ATTRIBUTE30 ATTRIBUTE30, tl.LANGUAGE LANGUAGE, tl.SOURCE_LANG SOURCE_LANG, tl.RECORD_NAME RECORD_NAME, tl.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, rec.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, rec.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, rec.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, rec.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, rec.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, rec.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, rec.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, rec.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, rec WHERE tl.REPORT_RECORD_ID = rec.REPORT_RECORD_ID AND tl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
